name: SQD [4Fe-4S] (54e, 36o)
method: SQD with circuit and orbital optimization
computeResourcesQuantum: IBM Heron r2 | LUCJ circuit (one layer) ~3500 2-qubit gates

name: [4Fe-4S] (54e, 36o) CISD
method: Configuration Interaction with singled and doubles
